allow: Bash(node -e "const {PrismaClient} = require\('./node_modules/@prisma/client'\); const p = new PrismaClient\({datasourceUrl: 'postgresql://test:test@localhost/test'}\); console.log\('OK'\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./node_modules/prisma/package.json'\); console.log\('prisma:', p.version\); const pb = require\('./node_modules/@prisma/client/package.json'\); console.log\('client:', pb.version, 'peerDeps:', JSON.stringify\(pb.peerDependencies || {}\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('prisma:', d.get\('dependencies',{}\).get\('prisma'\) or d.get\('devDependencies',{}\).get\('prisma'\)\); print\('@prisma/client:', d.get\('dependencies',{}\).get\('@prisma/client'\)\)")
